Petition For Termination Of The Clorinda Giannini Memorial Trust
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Termination Of The Clorinda Giannini Memorial Trust
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of The Clorinda Giannini Memorial Trust
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Jul-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-19-302748 The Clorinda Giannini Memorial Benefit Fund Trust and PTR-19-302749 The A.P. Giannini Foundation for Employees Trust.

Appearances: Alexander Gershen for Bank of America.

The Court noted that there is a procedural issue, that verification was submitted for one matter, but not the other, and stated that there is no explanation as to what the adverse tax consequences are. Mr. Gershen stated that verifications were filed and served last week, spoke of the intent of these trusts and spoke of the changes in the IRS' policy/new restrictions with regard to these types of charitable trusts. Mr. Gershen also stated that he received an e-mail from the Regents of The University of California indicating that they are in non-opposition. The Petitions for Termination of the Trusts, etc. are continued to July 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Gershen to file a supplement that explains what the tax consequence is.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
